name: Experience Self-Distillation
description: Convert raw task trajectories into reusable strategic principles, then retrieve and apply them to new tasks.

name: Memory Decay and Reinforcement
description: Apply Ebbinghaus forgetting curve to agent memory — reinforce what matters, let trivia fade.

name: Reflective Self-Critique Loop
description: Structured self-evaluation after task completion — predict outcomes, compare reality, extract delta.

name: Prompt Self-Mutation
description: Systematically evolve own prompts and workflows through variation, evaluation, and selection.

name: Skill-Injected Specialist Agent
description: Blueprint for creating a new domain-specific agent that auto-loads skill files as prompt context.

name: agent-infra-audit
description: Evaluate agent infrastructure needs from first-person operational experience, using a three-layer prioritization framework.

name: murch-rule-of-six
description: Walter Murch's hierarchical framework for deciding when and where to cut in video editing.

name: sustained-two-shot
description: Hold two actors in one frame instead of cutting to shot-reverse-shot — lets chemistry happen that editing can't replicate.

name: temp-music-trap
description: Avoid the temp track anchoring effect — don't let placeholder music constrain your final score/soundtrack.

name: Quote Verification
description: Verify attributed quotes before using them — search for original source, flag unverified attributions, never trust parametric memory for exact wording.

name: citation-verification
description: Never output unverified citations — use search tools first or mark [未验证]

name: comparative-essay-prep
description: Structured two-work comparison research brief for article writing.

name: research-to-playbook
description: Transform a broad research question into an actionable skill file via structured web research and synthesis.

name: cross-model-research-synthesis
description: Use multiple AI sources (web research + LLM APIs) to research a topic, then compare and synthesize into a final methodology.

name: substack-notes-promo
description: Generate and publish multi-angle promotional Notes for Substack, with queue for rate limits.

name: arxiv-lit-search
description: Systematically search arxiv and recent literature for papers on a research topic, returning structured summaries with IDs, authors, year, and core findings.

name: ai-agent-memory-diagnosis
description: Systematically diagnose why AI agent memory fails and evaluate architectural solutions against specific failure modes.

name: agent-skill-authoring
description: How to design and add new skills to an explorer-style agent system with skill index registration.

name: skip-prethink-when-plan-already-established
description: Don't re-invoke a planning/thinking step before creative writing when the approach was already fully negotiated in conversation

name: decompose-research-then-implement
description: Split 'find reliable X and integrate it' tasks into separate research and implementation phases

name: verify-file-write-before-linking
description: Always verify a file contains the full intended content before claiming completion and sharing a link to it.

name: pipeline-timeout-holistic-audit
description: When fixing a timeout in a multi-step pipeline, audit ALL step timeouts before making changes, not just the one that triggered

name: persist-artifact-entities
description: When creating an artifact (essay, analysis, report), explicitly persist key entities it references into memory

name: decompose-coding-tasks-by-timeout-profile
description: Split research tasks and code-modification tasks into separate, smaller steps to avoid timeout kills

name: persist-before-claiming-completion
description: Never claim you created an artifact (article, file, code) unless it is durably saved to disk first

name: pipeline-output-coupling
description: When pipeline A produces output that pipeline B consumes, A must write to B's expected location — never rely on separate batch exports.

name: error-context-must-be-diagnostic
description: Task failure logs must capture actionable diagnostic information, not just a generic failure string

name: find-latest-screenshot
description: When a user references a screenshot without giving a path, locate and read the most recent image file from common drop locations.

name: multi-agent-pipeline-failure-analysis
description: Root cause analysis framework for multi-agent pipeline failures, distinguishing routing errors from error propagation errors.

name: multi-agent-pipeline-hardening
description: Three-layer defense pattern for preventing cascading failures and bad outputs in multi-agent pipelines.

name: diagnose-automation-silence
description: Diagnose why an automation script ran but produced no output, separating logic bugs from external resource failures.

name: diagnose-stuck-process
description: Diagnose a stuck background process: verify liveness, find logs, identify bottleneck, recommend kill-or-wait.

name: dual-provider-api-fallback
description: Add a config-driven fallback mechanism when integrating two API providers (e.g., primary hits 429/quota, auto-switch to secondary).

name: substack-dedup-post
description: Find and remove duplicate Substack posts via the API, preserving the original.

name: audit-autonomous-pipeline-compliance
description: Diagnose why an autonomous pipeline ignores instructions by tracing all execution paths and config reads.

name: check-existing-artifacts-before-creating
description: Before starting any writing or creation task, verify the artifact doesn't already exist

name: permission-revocation-must-propagate-to-pipelines
description: When a user revokes permission for an external action, immediately audit and disable ALL automated pipelines that could trigger it — not just the current session's behavior.

name: agent-error-must-be-diagnostic
description: Task failures in agent pipelines must emit enough context to be actionable — 'unable to generate reply' is a symptom, not a cause

name: writing-pipeline-timeout-handling
description: Prevent and recover from claude_think timeouts in automated writing pipelines

name: selective-laziness-is-still-laziness
description: High task completion rate does not excuse systematic avoidance of growth-oriented commitments

name: verify-browser-automation-dependencies
description: Always verify browser automation module availability before attempting to run browser tasks
